reviews.review_description: Love the game and was really enjoying it until you get to some of the upper levels where you can not continue because there is no target to hit to start the level..  Reinstalled it and was still unable to continue.. oh well, hopefully it gets fixed. Like I said, it is a great game but needs fixing..

Very surprised just how good this is,the graphics are decent,the mechanics are first class ,so far no glitches the menu is detailed and tutorial is very good…cannot believe such a low price ..there seems to be quite a few extras to earn and pick up. .lots of detail for such a low price game and puts to shame in my opinion some much higher priced games. Great stuff devs ,,ps where is arrow song 1  game ?👍👍👍👍

developer_response.body: Thank you very much for your feedback and suggestions. arrow song1 Coming soon
